title: Weekly Tanker Time Charter Estimates, January 12 2022
section_path: Weekly Tanker Time Charter Estimates, January 12 2022
section_path_text: Weekly Tanker Time Charter Estimates, January 12 2022
summary:
Main
Some activity reported in the crude market this week with a handful of suezmax period fixturesreported and also interest in a VLCC although Covid uncertainty continued to afflict the market and rate levels remain low. On the clean side, there has been little to report in the way of fixtures this week and we see a continuation of this lull for the remainder of January.
